name: claims-processor-with-sre-devops
description: Developer operations scripts for Claims Processor With SRE. Not a Node.js application.

scripts.services:stop:portal-advisor: lsof -ti:8081 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || echo 'Portal-Claims-Advisor not running'
scripts.services:stop:portal-member: lsof -ti:8082 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || echo 'Portal-Claims-Member not running'
scripts.services:stop:api-claims: lsof -ti:8083 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || echo 'API-Claims not running'
scripts.services:stop:api-members: lsof -ti:8084 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || echo 'API-Members not running'
scripts.services:stop:portal-batch: lsof -ti:8085 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || echo 'Portal-Batch-Assignment not running'
scripts.services:stop:api-tenants: lsof -ti:8086 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || echo 'API-Tenants not running'
scripts.services:stop:api-entitlements: lsof -ti:8087 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || echo 'API-Entitlements not running'
scripts.services:stop:portal-tenants: lsof -ti:8088 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || echo 'Portal-Tenants not running'
scripts.services:stop:portal-entitlements: lsof -ti:8089 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || echo 'Portal-Entitlements not running'
scripts.services:stop:portal-sre: lsof -ti:8090 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || echo 'Portal-SRE not running'
scripts.services:start:all: npm run build:libs && npm run services:start:portal-advisor && npm run services:start:portal-member && npm run services:start:api-claims && npm run services:start:api-members && npm run services:start:portal-batch && npm run services:start:api-tenants && npm run services:start:api-entitlements && npm run services:start:portal-tenants && npm run services:start:portal-entitlements && npm run services:start:portal-sre
scripts.services:start:all:postgres: npm run build:libs && npm run services:start:portal-advisor:postgres && npm run services:start:portal-member:postgres && npm run services:start:api-claims:postgres && npm run services:start:api-members:postgres && npm run services:start:portal-batch:postgres && npm run services:start:api-tenants:postgres && npm run services:start:api-entitlements:postgres && npm run services:start:portal-tenants:postgres && npm run services:start:portal-entitlements:postgres && npm run services:start:portal-sre:postgres
scripts.services:stop:all: npm run services:stop:portal-advisor; npm run services:stop:portal-member; npm run services:stop:api-claims; npm run services:stop:api-members; npm run services:stop:portal-batch; npm run services:stop:api-tenants; npm run services:stop:api-entitlements; npm run services:stop:portal-tenants; npm run services:stop:portal-entitlements; npm run services:stop:portal-sre
scripts.services:status:all: npm run services:status:portal-advisor; npm run services:status:portal-member; npm run services:status:api-claims; npm run services:status:api-members; npm run services:status:portal-batch; npm run services:status:api-tenants; npm run services:status:api-entitlements; npm run services:status:portal-tenants; npm run services:status:portal-entitlements; npm run services:status:portal-sre
scripts.devops:start:postgres: cd DevOps/Local/Postgres && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops up -d
scripts.devops:stop:postgres: cd DevOps/Local/Postgres && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops down
scripts.devops:status:postgres: cd DevOps/Local/Postgres && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops ps
scripts.devops:start:redis: cd DevOps/Local/Redis && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops up -d
scripts.devops:stop:redis: cd DevOps/Local/Redis && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops down
scripts.devops:status:redis: cd DevOps/Local/Redis && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops ps
scripts.devops:start:kafka: cd DevOps/Local/Kafka && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops up -d
scripts.devops:stop:kafka: cd DevOps/Local/Kafka && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops down
scripts.devops:status:kafka: cd DevOps/Local/Kafka && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops ps
scripts.devops:start:prometheus: cd DevOps/Local/Observability/Prometheus && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops up -d
scripts.devops:stop:prometheus: cd DevOps/Local/Observability/Prometheus && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops down
scripts.devops:status:prometheus: cd DevOps/Local/Observability/Prometheus && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops ps
scripts.devops:start:alertmanager: cd DevOps/Local/Observability/Alertmanager && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops up -d
scripts.devops:stop:alertmanager: cd DevOps/Local/Observability/Alertmanager && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops down
scripts.devops:status:alertmanager: cd DevOps/Local/Observability/Alertmanager && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops ps
scripts.devops:start:grafana: cd DevOps/Local/Observability/Grafana && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops up -d
scripts.devops:stop:grafana: cd DevOps/Local/Observability/Grafana && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops down
scripts.devops:status:grafana: cd DevOps/Local/Observability/Grafana && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops ps

scripts.devops:stop:elastic: cd DevOps/Local/Search/Elastic && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops down
scripts.devops:status:elastic: cd DevOps/Local/Search/Elastic && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops ps
scripts.devops:start:kibana: cd DevOps/Local/Observability/Kibana && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops up -d
scripts.devops:stop:kibana: cd DevOps/Local/Observability/Kibana && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops down
scripts.devops:status:kibana: cd DevOps/Local/Observability/Kibana && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops ps
scripts.devops:start:filebeat: cd DevOps/Local/Search/Filebeat && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops up -d
scripts.devops:stop:filebeat: cd DevOps/Local/Search/Filebeat && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops down
scripts.devops:status:filebeat: cd DevOps/Local/Search/Filebeat && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops ps
scripts.devops:start:jaeger: cd DevOps/Local/Tracing/Jaeger && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops up -d
scripts.devops:stop:jaeger: cd DevOps/Local/Tracing/Jaeger && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops down
scripts.devops:status:jaeger: cd DevOps/Local/Tracing/Jaeger && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops ps
scripts.devops:start:zipkin: cd DevOps/Local/Tracing/Zipkin && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops up -d
scripts.devops:stop:zipkin: cd DevOps/Local/Tracing/Zipkin && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops down
scripts.devops:status:zipkin: cd DevOps/Local/Tracing/Zipkin && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops ps
scripts.devops:start:wiremock: cd DevOps/Local/Wiremock && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops up -d
scripts.devops:stop:wiremock: cd DevOps/Local/Wiremock && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops down
scripts.devops:status:wiremock: cd DevOps/Local/Wiremock && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops ps
scripts.devops:start:ollama: cd DevOps/Local/Ollama && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops up -d
scripts.devops:stop:ollama: cd DevOps/Local/Ollama && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops down
scripts.devops:status:ollama: cd DevOps/Local/Ollama && docker compose -p claims-processor-devops ps
